name: query_system
description: Query real-time Windows system diagnostics. Returns a compressed, token-efficient narrative about system health. Use this when the user asks about system performance, running processes, memory, disk, CPU, or hardware.

intent.description: Natural language description of what system information you need. Examples: 'why is my system slow', 'what processes are running', 'check memory usage', 'get hardware specs'

model.description: Identifier for the calling model. Use 'claude'.
